MLB_SAME_PROP_PARLAY: Able to combine multiple selections into a parlay
MLB_SAME_PROP_PARLAY_2: Able to combine multiple selections into a parlay
PLAYER_TO_RECORD_MOST_HITS_IN_THE_SERIES: Dead Heat Rules apply in the event of a tie.
PLAYER_TO_HIT_THE_MOST_HRS_IN_THE_SERIES: Dead Heat Rules apply in the event of a tie.
MOST_SERIES_TOTAL_BASES: Total Bases are recorded through hits by the listed player. They do not include walks, HBPs, stolen bases, reach on errors, or fielder's choices.
Player must record a Plate Appearance in the Series for action.
Dead Heat Rules apply in the event of a tie.
SERIES_SPECIALS_-_COMPLETE_GAME: A starting pitcher must pitch the entirety of a game without the benefit of a relief pitcher to qualify.
MOST_SERIES_RBIS: Dead Heat Rules apply in the event of a tie.
LONGEST_HR_DISTANCE: Home Run distances will be sourced from MLB Statcast.
ANY_PLAYER_TO_HIT_X+_HOME_RUNS: Market refers to amount of Home Runs hit in one game. Home Runs hit across multiple games will not count toward this market.
STARTING_PITCHER_STRIKEOUT_THRESHOLD_SPE: Market refers to amount of strikeouts recorded in one game. Strikeouts recorded across multiple games will not count toward this market.
REGULAR_SEASON_STAT_LEADER: Other selections available on request. If two or more players tie for the lead, Dead Heat rules apply.
Batters must record at least one MLB plate appearance and pitchers must face at least one MLB hitter during the regular season for bets to be action. Should these not be met, bets will be voided.
REGULAR_SEASON_STAT_TOTAL: Batters must record at least one MLB regular season plate appearance and pitchers must face at least one MLB hitter during the regular season for bets to have action.
PITCHER_TO_RECORD_X+_REGULAR_SEASON_STRI: Pitcher must face at least one MLB hitter during the regular season for action.
PLAYER_TO_HIT_FIRST_HOME_RUN_OF_THE_SEAS: All bets are action. Combine up to 5 selections from different teams. Other selections available on request.
PLAYER_TO_RECORD_X+_REGULAR_SEASON_STOLE: Player must record at least one MLB regular season plate appearance for action.
REGULAR_SEASON_STOLEN_BASES_LEADER: Other selections available on request. If two or more players tie for the lead, Dead Heat rules apply. Batters must record at least one MLB regular season plate appearance for bets to have action.
REGULAR_SEASON_STOLEN_BASE_TOTAL: Batters must record at least one MLB regular season plate appearance for bets to have action.
MOST_SERIES_HOME_RUNS: Player must record a Plate Appearance in the Series for action. Dead Heat Rules apply in the event of a tie.
MOST_SERIES_HITS: Player must record a Plate Appearance in the Series for action. Dead Heat Rules apply in the event of a tie.
MOST_SERIES_STRIKEOUTS: Pitchers must face at least one MLB hitter in the Series for bets to have action.
Dead Heat Rules apply in the event of a tie.
PITCHER_TO_RECORD_X+_REGULAR_SEASON_STRI: Parlay up to 5 selections across X+ regular season strikeout markets.
